name: Minted Coffee-Cocoa Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except the extract.
2. Stir to remove any lumps.
3. Add the extract and mix well until combined.
4. Seal in an airtight container.
5. To prepare, mix 2-3 heaping teaspoons per cup of water.
6. Heat the water first, then add the mixture.
